# kaleido_platform_connector_custom_api (Resource)

Deploys a custom API to a connector service using ABI, bytecode, and optional devdoc. This resource generates API endpoints from smart contract interfaces.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `abi` (String) The ABI JSON as a string or file path. If a file path is provided, the file will be read.
- `bytecode` (String) The contract bytecode as a hex string (with or without 0x prefix) or file path. If a file path is provided, the file will be read.
- `environment` (String) The environment ID where the connector service is located
- `name` (String) The name of the custom API
- `service_id` (String) The ID of the connector service where the custom API will be deployed

### Optional

- `devdoc` (String) (Optional) The devdoc JSON as a string or file path. If a file path is provided, the file will be read.
- `flow_type_bindings` (Map of String) Optional map of flow type to flow name. If not provided, will be auto-discovered from connector flows.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
